recommendations.title: Crooks in Clover

recommendations.title: The Great Spy Chase
recommendations.overview: A cold-war spy parody. After the death of an armaments manufacturer, an international group of spies is drawn into a high-stakes battle of wits to obtain the valuable military patents which have been inherited by the lovely widow.

recommendations.title: Cop or Hood

recommendations.title: Le Guignolo

recommendations.title: Death of a Corrupt Man

recommendations.title: The Nice Guys
recommendations.overview: A private eye investigates the apparent suicide of a fading porn star in 1970s Los Angeles and uncovers a conspiracy.

recommendations.title: The Shadow's Edge
recommendations.overview: Macau Police brings the tracking expert police officer out of retirement to help catch a dangerous group of professional thieves.
